steps.title: Identify the signal
steps.content: The notes provide two specific examples of the same sound written and pronounced very differently: “korrrr” (Batak) and “hu lu” (Mandarin), both representing snoring. To accomplish the goal, the response must show this contrast using both examples.

steps.title: Identify the answer
steps.content:
Choice A opens with “Though they both represent the sound of snoring” and closes with “are written and pronounced very differently,” explicitly pairing the shared sound with the contrasting forms using both specific examples.

The others each lack a critical element: the examples, the shared sound, or the contrasting forms.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
